series_metadata.series_description: Data, reports, contracts, school information, and other documents requested as part of the Sponsor Performance Review.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Ten years, provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Ten years, provided the records have been audited by the Auditor of State and the report is released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
